# Referee

Referee is research-integrity infrastructure for scholarly publishing, producing transparent, machine-readable reliability signals scored against the public CRWE v2.1 flaw taxonomy (11 top-level categories, 300 structured checks).

## Key pages
- / — Product overview, workflow, audience, and differentiation.
- /about — Mission, founder, and advisor information.
- /blog — Blog index.
- /blog/{slug} — Individual blog articles.
- /faq — Frequently asked questions.
- /talks — Recorded talks and interviews.

## Machine discovery
- /.well-known/agent-card.json — Agent discovery metadata and machine endpoint index.

## Content categories
- Product overview and screening workflow
- Mission, founder, and advisor information
- Blog articles on research integrity, peer review, adversarial review, and AI-assisted research validation
- FAQs about reliability scoring, incentives, AI, and academic adoption
- Recorded talks and interviews
